creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do in Florida? 👀 
This spot (plus 1,000+ more) is in my Florida Travel Guide + Interactive Map perfect for weekend getaways, road trips, and exploring without hours of research and stress! 💬 Comment “GUIDE” and I’ll send it to you!

If you’ve never been to Three Sisters Springs, here is everything you need to know!

You’ll walk easy, flat trails and boardwalks that wind right along the springs, with plenty of overlooks to stop, take photos of the manatees and that unreal clear blue water.

A few things to know before you go:

📍 You don’t park at the springs themselves — you park at the Three Sisters Springs Visitor Center
Address: 917 Three Sisters Springs Trail, Crystal River, FL

🕰️ Hours: Typically open 8:30 AM–4:30 PM (last entry around 3:30 PM)

💵 Admission: Usually $12–$20 per adult depending on the season (kids 5 and under are free). Your ticket includes the shuttle ride to and from the springs. A nice little bonus: the shuttle takes you to other spots around Crystal River for shopping and dining. 

This is a great spot if you want beautiful nature without a strenuous hike — and in the winter months, you might even spot manatees hanging out in the springs.

Save this one for later — it’s a Florida must. 💧🌿

#floridasprings #threesistersspring #manateeseason

transcription.text: And I was running far away, would I run off the world someday, nobody knows, nobody knows And I was dancing in the rain, I felt alive and I can't complain But no, take me back
